series_metadata.series_description: These records are on microfiche sent from the Department of Commerce that used to administer the Auctioneer program. These records contain license applications and renewal applications,Auction School information (e.g. transcripts of the course of study in professional auctioneering), criminal background investigations, and miscellaneous correspondence (e.g. address changes, change of sponsors, and bond cancelations).

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Keep for 5 years., Microform: Shred
